untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pairs trading with stochastic differences between two correlated assets. Available indicators operate on single instruments only. No cross-asset comparison operators or multi-instrument stochastic difference calculations are supported. Additionally, specific entry threshold criteria and exit conditions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source material.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires: (1) dual-instrument analysis capability to compare stochastics across two separate correlated assets, (2) calculation of stochastic differential metrics between instruments, (3) unspecified difference_threshold and specific_entry_signal parameters. The indicator set provided does not support cross-pair comparisons or relative stochastic differentials. Would require either: custom multi-asset indicator suite or explicit threshold parameters from original source.
